title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: We are seeking a skilled Machine Learning Engineer to design and implement ML models. You will work with large datasets, build predictive models, and deploy solutions to production. The ideal candidate has strong Python skills and experience with deep learning frameworks.
education: Bachelor's in CS or related field

title: Data Scientist
description: Join our data science team to extract insights from complex data. You'll build statistical models, create visualizations, and communicate findings to stakeholders. Experience with NLP and time-series analysis is a plus.

title: AI Research Scientist
description: Lead cutting-edge AI research projects. Develop novel algorithms for computer vision and NLP applications. Publish research papers and collaborate with academic partners.
education: PhD in AI or related field

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze business data to drive strategic decisions. Create dashboards, reports, and automated data pipelines. Work closely with business teams to understand requirements.

title: Software Engineer - AI/ML
description: Build scalable AI-powered features for our product. Integrate ML models into production systems. Optimize inference speed and model performance.

title: NLP Engineer
description: Specialize in natural language processing solutions. Build chatbots, sentiment analysis systems, and text classification models. Experience with transformers and large language models preferred.

title: Computer Vision Engineer
description: Develop computer vision solutions for image and video analysis. Work on object detection, segmentation, and facial recognition systems.

title: MLOps Engineer
description: Bridge the gap between ML development and operations. Build CI/CD pipelines for ML models, monitor model performance, and manage infrastructure.

title: Business Intelligence Analyst
description: Transform raw data into actionable business insights. Design data warehouses, create executive dashboards, and perform ad-hoc analysis.

title: AI Product Manager
description: Lead AI product development from ideation to launch. Define product roadmap, work with engineering teams, and ensure AI ethics and fairness.
required_skills: Product Management,AI/ML Knowledge,Agile,Data Analysis,Communication,Strategy,User Research,A/B Testing,SQL,Leadership
